entities.name: SOIL BUNDS
entities.description: Conservation structures used to reduce surface runoff and soil erosion on hill slopes

entities.name: SURFACE RUNOFF
entities.description: Water flowing over the land surface, which soil bunds aim to reduce

entities.name: SOIL EROSION
entities.description: The process of soil displacement, which leads to loss of nutrients and organic carbon

entities.name: SOIL ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: A key component of soil health that declines due to soil erosion

entities.name: NUTRIENTS
entities.description: Essential soil elements including nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium

entities.name: CROPLAND PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The agricultural output capacity of the land, negatively affected by soil erosion

entities.name: SOUTHWEST ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The region where the study on soil and water conservation was conducted

entities.name: OMO-GIBE RIVER BASIN
entities.description: The specific river basin in southwest Ethiopia where experimental fields were located

entities.name: UNIVERSAL SOIL LOSS EQUATION
entities.description: A mathematical model used to describe and predict soil losses

entities.name: POTASSIUM
entities.description: A plant-available nutrient lost during soil erosion

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: A plant-available nutrient lost during soil erosion

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: A nutrient lost from plots without soil bunds

entities.name: SUSPENDED MATERIAL
entities.description: Soil particles removed in suspended form, containing higher concentrations of SOC and nutrients
